text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Should I pick the card on the right? Or the one in
the middle?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Aha! The one on the left must be the joker! Hehe.
Your poker face is awful, Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Waaah! I was trying so hard, too! Urgh... I
definitely won't lose next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O doesn't manage to win a single
round due to how starkly she wears her emotions
on her sleeve...
